prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约6715→6329→6305→4710→4337，整体呈持续前移趋势（位次数字减小），近两年加速上升，2025年基准约4337名；本省物理类计划2021–2025年分别为133、132、139、133、132人，基本稳定在132–139人区间；2026年计划增至149人，较2025年扩招约12.9%，竞争压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名2021年第25→2022年第24→2023年第25→2024年第23→2025年第21→2026年第23，稳居全国前25名，属顶尖工科院校；航空宇航科学与 技术A+、计算机科学与技术A+、材料科学与工程A+、机械工程A、控制科学与工程A-、信息与通信工程A-，共7个A类学科，其中2个A+，实力突出；2026年声誉评价偏负面（校园安全事件），但影响有限；抖音热度排名第74位（一般），短视频曝光量中等；未见明显投档断档记录。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机 类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐；航空航天相关专业关注度上升；湖北省2026年普通高考总人数约39.37万，较2025年（物理类约24.98万+历史类约14.14万） 略有增加，竞争基数扩大；省控线2025年物理类本科批426分，较2024年437分略降；西北工业大学位于陕西西安，属跨省招生；该校在湖北招生占比不高，近年 物理类计划占该校全国总计划比例约2–3%，无显著地域偏好影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年扩招约12.9%使位次后移的供给效应，与学校层次持续上升、优势学科强势、考生 总数增加等需求侧因素对冲，预计2026年物理类最低位次在2025年4337名基础上小幅后移至约4622名，区间4122–5122名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 6715 → 6329 → 6305 → 4710 → 4337, showing a continuous upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), with accelerated increase in recent two years, and the 2025 baseline is about 4337; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 133, 132, 139, 133, 132 respectively, basically stable in the range of 132–139; the 2026 plan increases to 149, an expansion of about 12.9% compared to 2025, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking from 2021 to 2026 was 25th → 24th → 25th → 23rd → 21st → 23rd, consistently among the top 25 nationally, belonging to top-tier engineering institutions; it has A+ in Aeronautical and Astronautical Science and Technology, Computer Science and Technology, Materials Science and Engineering, A in Mechanical Engineering, A- in Control Science and Engineering, and A- in Information and Communication Engineering, totaling 7 A-class disciplines, including 2 A+, with outstanding strength; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative (campus safety incident), but the impact is limited; Douyin popularity ranking is 74th (average), with moderate short video exposure; no obvious enrollment gaps recorded.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended; Aerospace-related majors have rising attention; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Hubei Gaokao is about 393,700, slightly increased from 2025 (Physics Category about 249,800 + History Category about 141,400), expanding the competition base; the provincial control line for 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch is 426 points, slightly lower than 2024's 437 points; Northwestern Polytechnical University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, and recruits across provinces; its enrollment proportion in Hubei is not high, with recent Physics Category enrollment accounting for about 2–3% of the university's total national plan, with no significant regional preference effect.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the supply effect of the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 12.9% pushing the ranking backward, and the demand-side factors such as the continuously rising university level, strong advantageous disciplines, and increased total number of candidates offsetting each other, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 4337 to about 4622, with a range of 4122–5122.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Computer Class (Computer Science and Technology, etc.)
- Computer Class (Network Security).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Electronic Information Class

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- Architecture
- Chemistry Class (Advanced Polymer Pilot Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 4122–5122, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If the ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (<4122), focus on aiming for Tier 1 Aerospace Class undergraduate-graduate continuation class and Computer Class; if the ranking is in the middle of the range (about 4500–4800), mainly choose Tier 2 Electronic Information Class and Automation Class; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>5000), prioritize Tier 3 Materials Class, Mathematics Class, etc.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1922 → 2169 → 1852 → 2351 → 2441, showing overall volatility with a recent trend of moving backward (increasing ranking numbers). The baseline for 2025 is about 2441. The provincial enrollment plan for History Category from 2021 to 2025 was 4, 5, 5, 11, and 11 students respectively, expanding to 11 students from 2024 onward. The 2026 plan remains at 11 students, unchanged from 2025, with no supply-side changes.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; consistently ranked among the top 25 nationally in the Soft Science main ranking, making it a top-tier institution. However, the university is known for its strengths in science and engineering, with a relatively small scale of liberal arts programs. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat negative (campus safety incidents), but its impact on liberal arts admissions is limited. Douyin popularity ranking is 74th (average), with moderate attention. The university's liberal arts-related disciplines have not entered the A-class rating, with main advantages concentrated in engineering.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for Economics and Trade categories is divided and cautious, foreign language majors are generally average, and Business Administration is clearly discouraged. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Hubei Province is approximately 393,700, with History Category candidates estimated at about 142,000 based on the recent proportion of about 36%, a slight increase from 2025 (141,400). The provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch in 2025 was 442 points, slightly up from 432 points in 2024. Northwestern Polytechnical University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, which is an inter-provincial enrollment. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Hubei is very small (11 students), with no significant regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, a slight increase in the total number of candidates, and average popularity of liberal arts majors, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will slightly shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 2441 to approximately 2471, with a range of 2100–2842.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Northwestern Polytechnical University only enrolls in 3 major categories (total 11 students) for History Category in Hubei, with a very small enrollment scale. For rankings within the predicted range of 2100–2842, it is recommended to prioritize the Economics and Trade Category, with the Foreign Languages and Literature Category as a backup. Rankings better than the lower limit of the range (<2100) can be a sprint; rankings close to the upper limit (>2800) require caution, and the Business Administration Category can be considered as a safety option.
